name: Porterhouse of Lamb with Corn and Pepper Chow (Gc)
recipeIngredient: 4 ears corn kernels, husked and grilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all sauce ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil for 10 minutes while stirring.
2. Season lamb chops with salt and pepper. Grill over pecan wood for 6 minutes on first side and 4 1/2 minutes on reverse side.
3. Mix all vegetables except corn. Add salt, place in a pot and cover with water. Refrigerate overnight. Bring to a boil and cook for 8 minutes. Drain well.
4. Add sauce to drained vegetables and then add corn. Serve with lamb chops.
